case_title: TOBNONI PROPERTIES, A PARTNERSHIP vs. BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBNONI PROPERTIES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBNONI PROPERTIES, A PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4770 MISSION STREET #403 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4770 MISSION STREET #403 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANT, SANDRA BOLDRIDGE, CAN STAY ON THE PREMISES AT 4770 MISSION, #403, SAN FRANCISCO FOR 30 DAYS AFTER SHE RETURNS THE MUTUAL RELEASE TO TERMINATE LEASE TO THE HOUSING AUTHORITY.

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, SANDRA BOLDRIDGE, SHALL MOVE FROM THE PROPERTY AT 4770 MISSION, #403, 30 DAYS AFTER RETURNING SIGNED MUTUAL RELEASE TO TERMINATE LEASE TO THE HOUSING AUTHORITY. DEFENDANT, SANDRA BOLDRIDGE, SHALL PRESENT RELEASE TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WITHIN SEVEN DAYS FROM 3-1-94. AFTER DEFENDANT,SANDRA BOLDRIDGE, RECEIVES RELEASE FROM PLAINTIFF, SHE HAS SEVEN DAYS TO RETURN IT TO THE HOUSING AUTHORITY. PLAINTIFF SHALL KEEP SECURITY DEPOSITE FOR UNPAID UTILITY BILLS. DEFENDANT SHALL KEEP RENT CURRENT AS LONG AS SHE LIVES ON THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFF' ATTORNEY SHALL PREPARE JUDGEMENT.

parties.name: BOLDRIDGE, SANDRA 4770 MISSION ST. #403 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112
